meta.title: Recruiting Non-Traditional Talent for the OT Security Team
meta.description:
Andrea Kittelson of Rockwell Automation has had to hire a growing OT security force, and the OT security talent shortage makes this a challenge. She describes how to identify, hire, onboard and grow people into the OT security role. One of the keys is to look outside of the existing OT security talent pool. 

Andi describes 
- her non-traditional journey into OT security
- where to find non-traditional talent
- lay out career paths for non-traditional talent
- training and upskilling
- and more
